title: Non-record: AIR-MM v2 Debug Prototype — experimental importance routing
author: jmccrayiii

data.description: Per-token importance gating scales residual attention and MLP updates based on learned token importance.
Adds a positional recency signal and a learned combiner to blend learned importance with recency for routing decisions.
Fast-debug CPU-only training configuration with a 128-dim, 4-layer model and 10 training steps.

novel_contributions: Adaptive Importance Routing Memory Model (AIR-MM) for selective compute allocation
Learned token-importance gating to scale residual updates per token
Positional recency signal as an additional routing feature
Tiny learned combiner to blend learned importance and recency
Baseline-preserving ablation flag for clean comparison
Experimental non-record prototype with stable debug-run training behavior
